declaration_text: Firm-year observations nested in cities; digital-government rollout may alter information access and administrative frictions affecting green patenting.
diagnosand_or_gate: check unit grain treatment timing and city linkage coverage
redesign_option: shrink to city-year feasibility if firm linkage is too sparse
interpretation_boundary: Model supports feasibility assessment only not a causal claim

declaration_text: Target comparison is effect of city digital-government platform exposure on firm green patent count for linked firms during the rollout window.
diagnosand_or_gate: confirm outcome exposure population comparison time window and scale
redesign_option: reframe as descriptive rollout correlation if comparison is not credible
interpretation_boundary: Inquiry is provisional until author approves target comparison
author_decision_needed: decide whether causal estimand is substantively credible

declaration_text: Use city rollout list linked to firm-year patent panel; measure exposure by city-year rollout status and audit missing firm-city links.
diagnosand_or_gate: row loss linkage quality missingness and treatment timing coverage
redesign_option: drop to city-year panel or request better linkage if firm-year coverage fails
interpretation_boundary: Data strategy can support only coverage and linkage checks until audited

declaration_text: First answer strategy is a feasibility table and rollout timing figure before any DID model or event-study estimator.
diagnosand_or_gate: check whether comparison units and timing variation exist
redesign_option: switch to descriptive timing map if no comparison units exist
interpretation_boundary: Answer strategy produces inspection outputs not final estimates

declaration_text: Diagnose timing variation comparison-unit availability linkage loss missingness and whether claims would exceed the first outputs.
diagnosand_or_gate: timing variation comparison group linkage loss missingness overclaim risk
redesign_option: change comparison or abandon causal route if diagnosands fail
interpretation_boundary: Diagnosis is required before writing or slides use causal language

declaration_text: If firm-year causal route fails redesign to city-year descriptive rollout map source-verified mechanism corpus or measurement-focused literature map.
diagnosand_or_gate: failed linkage weak comparison no rollout variation or unverified source base
redesign_option: city-year descriptive route; mechanism corpus route; measurement literature route
interpretation_boundary: Redesign options are fallback routes not claims of contribution
author_decision_needed: choose preferred fallback route if causal route fails

declaration_text: Report only feasibility coverage timing and unresolved design decisions until data audit and methods review approve stronger claims.
diagnosand_or_gate: claim support source visibility and AI-writing boundary
redesign_option: route to claim ledger or slide map only after methods review
interpretation_boundary: No manuscript prose final claims or policy implications are supported at this stage
